stories.headline: New arXiv research introduces SpecMoE for fast and efficient mixture-of-experts inference

stories.explanation: Imagine a team of experts working together to solve a complex problem, with each expert contributing their unique skills and knowledge. SpecMoE is like a highly efficient manager that coordinates the work of these experts to achieve fast and accurate results.
